channel.title: Tableview on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in Tableview on adoption curve dot net

item.title: Where to put the registerNib method in a table view controller
item.description: Here’s a quick workaround for a gotcha if you’re using iOS5’s registerNib: method in conjunction with a table view controller class that’s external to the controller of the view that contains the table. Scenario: You’ve got a table view in a Storyboard (or standard xib file) which is controlled by a UITableViewController class which is separate to the class controlling the Storyboard (or view). You want to use a custom cell layout contained in a separate xib file.
